ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group (e.g., 20-24, 25-29) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the age group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_tables" (
  "rate_table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate table */,
  "rate_table_name" TEXT /* Name of the rate table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate table */,
  "plan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated plan type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rate table was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the rate table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "rate_table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rate table */,
  "preferred_rate" TEXT /* Preferred rate for the age group and rate table */,
  "standard_rate" TEXT /* Standard rate for the age group and rate table */,
  "table_2_rate" TEXT /* Rate for the age group and rate table 2 */,
  "table_8_rate" TEXT /* Rate for the age group and rate table 8 */,
  "location_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated location rate */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rates_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rates_rate_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_table_id") REFERENCES rate_tables ("rate_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_history" (
  "rate_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate change */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rate */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the rate change took effect */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the rate change expired */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the rate change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the rate change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rate change was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the rate change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_history_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., actuary, underwriter) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rate_table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rate table */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the user and rate table (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_rate_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_table_id") REFERENCES rate_tables ("rate_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_types" (
  "plan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan type */,
  "plan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the plan type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the plan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_rates" (
  "location_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location rate */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "rate_table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rate table */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Rate for the location and rate table */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the location rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the location rate expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the location rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_rates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_rates_rate_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_table_id") REFERENCES rate_tables ("rate_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_analytics" (
  "rate_analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate analytics record */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rate */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., trend, comparison) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_analytics_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_analytics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "data_visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "data_visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the data visualization */,
  "data_visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the data visualization was generated */,
  "data_visualization_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the data visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the data visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data visualization was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
